news.title: UW–Madison’s Popkewitz receives Fulbright Specialist Award
news.summary_en: UW–Madison’s Thomas S. Popkewitz, a professor in the School of Education’s Department of Curriculum and Instruction, has received a Fulbright Specialist Program award.

news.title: Dance Department presents Repertory Concert 2026
news.summary_en: The UW–Madison Dance Department presents its Repertory Concert 2026, featuring work from Omari Carter, Bradford Chin, Aaron Loux, Anna Peretz Rogovoy, Liz Sexe, and Collette Stewart. Performances will take place April 23–25 in the Margaret H’Doubler Performance Space, Lathrop Hall.

news.title: ELPA higher education faculty member Xueli Wang wins inaugural UW–Madison graduate student mentoring award
news.summary_en: Xueli Wang was one of just six faculty members campus-wide to be chosen for the The Graduate School’s inaugural Faculty Award for Excellence in Graduate Student Mentoring.

news.title: Building research leaders: A new model for empowering undergraduates to strengthen research teams
news.summary_en: At the Center for Research on Complex Thinking (CRCT) in UW–Madison's School of Education, undergraduates routinely perform at a graduate-student level and help train faculty and researchers from around the world.
